assertionResults.reason: Each source file in the Sources tree shows exactly one indicator matching ingested state derived from wiki frontmatter references. books/sample-book.md is shown as ingested and is referenced in wiki/entities/typescript.md frontmatter sources; articles/ai-safety.md and rust-intro.md are shown pending and are absent from wiki sources references.

frictions.description: agent-browser network requests output returned "No requests captured" in this run.
frictions.resolution: Captured required /api/sources and /api/dashboard network evidence directly via curl against the assigned local API.

notes: UI snapshot includes: ai-safety.md pending, sample-book.md ingested, rust-intro.md pending.
Console errors file is empty (no console errors reported).
GET /api/sources returned HTTP 200 with source tree entries under raw/.
GET /api/dashboard returned HTTP 200 with pending=[articles/ai-safety.md,rust-intro.md], confirming books/sample-book.md is ingested.
wiki/entities/typescript.md frontmatter sources includes books/sample-book.md, matching ingested indicator in UI.

reproductionSteps: Open http://localhost:5173 in agent-browser session valsrc002rerun.
Navigate to Sources tab and observe per-file status indicators in the source tree.
Confirm sample-book.md displays ingested while ai-safety.md and rust-intro.md display pending.
Verify ingested ground truth from /tmp/apara-test-repo-source-manager-r2/wiki/entities/typescript.md frontmatter sources.
Capture API evidence via GET http://localhost:3000/api/sources and GET http://localhost:3000/api/dashboard (both HTTP 200).
Check console errors and capture screenshot evidence.
